title: Colored Tractor Beams
description: a way to make crackers wither storm have tractor beams that look more like minecraft story mode!
body:
To make crackers wither storm mod a bit more to your liking! it changes the color of the tractor beam on the wither storm to make it whatever color you like instead of pink! its main use is just a tweak to make the tractor beams on the wither storm look better.

Disclaimer: does not add the wither storm only changes the color of the tractor beams you will need to install cracker's wither storm mod for this to work.
